name: conservation-costshare
title: Conservation Insight — Program Cost-Share ROI
subtitle: cost-share dollars, enrolled acres & adoption return by practice
description: A conservation-insight financial showcase — cost-share efficiency (spend vs. adoption), cost-per-acre trend over time, cost-share dollars by practice, and a return-score ranking by practice.

dataAccesses.name: CostShareKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(cost_share_usd) AS cost_share_total, SUM(acres) AS acres_enrolled, ROUND(SUM(cost_share_usd)/NULLIF(SUM(acres),0),0) AS avg_cost_per_acre, ROUND(AVG(pct)/(SUM(cost_share_usd)/100000),1) AS return_score FROM v_cost_share_roi

dataAccesses.name: CostShareEfficiency
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT practice, ROUND(SUM(cost_share_usd)/NULLIF(SUM(acres),0),0) AS cost_per_acre, ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS adoption_pct, SUM(acres) AS acres FROM v_cost_share_roi GROUP BY 1

dataAccesses.name: CostShareByPractice
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT practice, SUM(cost_share_usd) AS cost_share FROM v_cost_share_roi GROUP BY 1

dataAccesses.name: CostPerAcreTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT year, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN practice='Cover crops' THEN cost_per_acre END),0) AS coverCrops_cost, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN practice='No-till' THEN cost_per_acre END),0) AS noTill_cost FROM v_cost_share_trend WHERE ${sinceYear} = '%' OR year >= ${sinceYear} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: CostShareYears
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT year FROM v_cost_share_trend ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: ReturnScoreByPractice
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT practice, ROUND(AVG(pct) / NULLIF(SUM(cost_share_usd)/100000,0),1) AS return_score FROM v_cost_share_roi GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

kpis.label: Total Cost-Share Paid
kpis.info: Total cost-share dollars disbursed across all tracked practices.

kpis.label: Enrolled Acres
kpis.info: Total acreage enrolled under a cost-share agreement.

kpis.label: Avg Cost per Acre
kpis.info: Blended cost-share dollars per enrolled acre.

kpis.label: Return Score
kpis.info: Adoption points achieved per $100K of cost-share spend -- a rough return-on-spend indicator.

panels.title: Cost-Share Efficiency: Spend vs. Adoption
panels.info: Each practice's cost-share spend per acre against the adoption rate it bought.

panels.title: Cost-Share Dollars by Practice
panels.info: Where cost-share dollars are disbursed across the four tracked practices.

panels.title: Cost per Acre Trend
panels.sub: responds to the Since-year filter above
panels.info: Cost-share dollars per acre over time for the two leading practices.

panels.title: Return Score by Practice
panels.info: Adoption points achieved per $100K of cost-share spend, ranked by practice.
